raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need find .php, wc -l, sum. Use find . -name '*.php' -print0 | xargs -0 wc -l | awk '{s+=$1} END{print s}'. But wc -l prints count and filename, last line total? Actually wc -l on multiple files prints each line count and total. So just find ... | xargs wc -l. That prints per file and total. But requirement: prints total count. So use awk to sum first column.
